user.title: Amap Commute Setup
user.description:
Enter your Amap Web API Key and coordinates.

Coordinate format: longitude,latitude (e.g. {coord_example})

📅 Auto update schedule: Peak hours 07:00–09:00 every {peak_interval} min, other times every {normal_interval} min.

Get a free API Key at [Amap Open Platform](https://lbs.amap.com/).

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API Key, please check and retry
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Amap server, check your network
error.api_error: Amap API returned an error, check your parameters
